notes: Minimal witness dataset manually constructed for PostgreSQL and MySQL validation
PostgreSQL rewrite_pos_01.sql returned the same row as source.sql
PostgreSQL rewrite_neg_01.sql returned an empty result
MySQL rewrite_pos_01.sql returned the same row as source.sql
MySQL rewrite_neg_01.sql returned an empty result
The negative rewrite tightens the HAVING threshold from > 3 to > 4
